title: Stick A Needle In Your Eye
description: Lobotomizing players on the client-side since whenever we started doing so.
body:
> _"Uh, how do I make a good description for a mod that literally lobotomises you?"_
> -AussieBox, 2025 > **Please note:** This mod is _not_ my primary focus. It was created for a friend, and is mainly a highly overdone joke. Please enjoy the mod as is, as I will _not_ be updating it often. Not that there's much more to add. Not much you can do with a mod like this. Stick A Needle In Your Eye (aka. SANIYE) is a client-sided mod that flashes your screen with user-selected images at random intervals or when specific conditions are met. This mod is heavily inspired by the "lobotomy" memes seen on the internet in late 2024-early 2025. ### WARNING: This mod may cause epileptic seizures! SANIYE currently contains two (2) triggers that can cause you to be "lobotomised": - Client Tick - Damage Taken All triggers have config options related to them, including toggles and configurable chances for the trigger to pass.

You can also add your own custom images by linking to a texture's _entire file path._ This includes custom textures added by resource packs!
